hooks.command: echo '## Claude Code Swarm (openteams)' && echo '' && if ! command -v openteams >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'openteams CLI not found. Installing...' >&2 && npm install -g openteams 2>&1 >&2; fi && if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ]; then TMPL=$(node -e "console.log(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).template||'')" 2>/dev/null) && if [ -n "$TMPL" ]; then echo "Team template configured: **$TMPL**" && echo '' && echo 'Use `/swarm` to launch the team, or ask me to spin up the team.' && echo '' && echo 'Available commands:' && echo '- `/swarm` — Launch the configured team topology' && echo '- `/swarm <template>` — Launch a specific template (get-shit-done, bmad-method)'; else echo 'No template configured in .claude-swarm.json'; fi; else echo 'No `.claude-swarm.json` found. Use `/swarm` to launch a team topology.' && echo '' && echo 'Built-in templates: **get-shit-done**, **bmad-method**' && echo '' && echo 'Quick setup: create `.claude-swarm.json` with `{"template": "get-shit-done"}`'; fi
